original: The sand worm you’re fighting is currently burrowing in the sand around you. You can see where it is by following the small bulge it makes in the sandy earth. Whatever you try to do to it now will likely not have much effect on it. Maybe you should wait until it is exposed so that you can do more damage?

The majority of the creature’s vulnerable-looking front end is poking out of the sand, looking at you. The sand worm wiggles this way and that, almost like a charmed snake poking out of an urn. It may not look like it’s doing anything dangerous at the moment, but you have a feeling that it might have a tactical move at the ready. To hit it now will likely result in a quick victory. Unfortunately the likelihood of hitting your surprisingly agile foe may be a long shot.

Remembering that "+e.getCombatPronoun("heshe")+" "+(t?"have":"has")+" a hoverboard, "+e.getCombatName()+" quickly read"+(t?"y":"ies")+" it, just in time for the ground under "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" to become uneven as the worm burrows past. It causes "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" to wobble a bit, but ultimately "+e.getCombatPronoun("heshe")+" "+(t?"are":"is")+" left unscathed; and "+e.getCombatPronoun("heshe")+" descend"+(t?"":"s")+" back to the ground.
The worm quickly turns up the ground where "+e.getCombatPronoun("heshe")+" "+(t?"were":"was")+" standing only a few moments ago.

The worm turns up the ground beneath "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+", knocking "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" over with enough force to roll "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" several meters away. "+l.m.capitalize(e.getCombatPronoun("heshe"))+" land"+(t?"":"s")+" on a number of rocks and debris along the way. That is going to leave a bruise!
"+l.m.capitalize(e.getCombatPronoun("heshe"))+" hurriedly dodge"+(t?"":"s")+" to the side, narrowly avoiding being hit by the projectile!

The slime hits "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" straight in the chest and splatters all across your body. "+l.m.capitalize(e.getCombatPronoun("heshe"))+" can feel it coating the surface of your [pc.gear], but thankfully it can’t seem to penetrate it, and "+e.getCombatPronoun("heshe")+" "+(t?"are":"is")+" left safe.

The slime hits "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" straight in the chest, and splatters all across "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" body. "+l.m.capitalize(e.getCombatPronoun("heshe"))+" can almost feel it being absorbed by "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" skin through "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" [pc.gear]. The purpose of the slime is soon made clear as "+e.getCombatPronoun("heshe")+" feel"+(t?"":"s")+" a tingling in "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" ass, and a lustful heat that spreads across "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" body. "+l.m.capitalize(e.getCombatPronoun("heshe"))+" find"+(t?"":"s")+" "+(e instanceof y.n?"your":e.getCombatPronoun("himher"))+"self one step closer to being paralyzed by "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" own mounting needs.
